history: Assistant: Hello! I'm Athena, a local-first AI cognitive operating system. How can I assist you today?
Assistant: I don't have access to personal information like your name. However, you can tell me your name if you'd like me to use it in our conversation! How can I assist you today?
Assistant: Hello, Rafael! Nice to meet you. How can I assist you today?
Assistant: Hello, Rafael! How can I assist you today?
